---
title: "Data"
description: "Interactive data visualizations and dashboards from my research on China's economic relations, foreign policy, and international order."
toc: false
page-layout: custom
---

::: {.section}
::: {.container}

## Data {.section-title}

::: {.data-intro}
This page collects interactive data visualizations from my ongoing research projects. Each project page features explorable charts built with publicly available or aggregated data. Click on a project below to explore.
:::

<div class="data-projects-grid">

<div class="data-project-card">
<a href="china-economic-power.html">
<div class="card-banner red"></div>
<div class="card-body">
<h3>China's Economic Power and Influence</h3>
<p>Tracking China's economic rise in comparative and historical perspective, with interactive charts on GDP growth and economic output across major economies.</p>
<div class="card-meta">
<span class="meta-tag">IMF WEO Data</span>
<span class="meta-tag">1980–2029</span>
<span class="meta-tag">GDP Growth</span>
</div>
<span class="card-link">Explore →</span>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="data-project-card">
<a href="celi/index.html">
<div class="card-banner blue"></div>
<div class="card-body">
<h3>Chinese Economic Leverage Index (CELI)</h3>
<p>The Chinese Economic Leverage Index measures the degree of China's economic leverage over other countries and regions. Explore trends and compare leverage patterns.</p>
<div class="card-meta">
<span class="meta-tag">Author's Data</span>
<span class="meta-tag">2010–2023</span>
<span class="meta-tag">Southeast Asia</span>
</div>
<span class="card-link">Explore →</span>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="data-project-card coming-soon">
<div class="card-banner green"></div>
<div class="card-body">
<h3>Chinese Security Accommodation Index (CSAI)</h3>
<p>The Chinese Security Accommodation Index measures the degree to which other states accommodate or resist China's security interests. Initially applied to Southeast Asia.</p>
<div class="card-meta">
<span class="meta-tag">Author's Data</span>
<span class="meta-tag">Southeast Asia</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

<div class="data-project-card coming-soon">
<div class="card-banner purple"></div>
<div class="card-body">
<h3>Chinese Foreign Policy Discourse</h3>
<p>Machine learning analysis of Chinese-language foreign policy texts. Tracking shifts in PRC foreign policy discourse through topic modeling and text analysis of official documents.</p>
<div class="card-meta">
<span class="meta-tag">NLP / Text Analysis</span>
<span class="meta-tag">PRC Documents</span>
</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>

:::
:::
